text:
[residual] credential-in-URL surfacing in logs is secret-exposure's domain, not a separate PII channel
[residual] cloned repo license obligation unnoticed — owned by reuse-build-vs-buy
[residual] one-time-no-sync staleness is a code_drift concern, not a clock concern
[close_reason] data flow is git URLs + dirs + hook files; no personal-data fields processed/persisted
[close_reason] local dev assembly, no regulated/personal data; cloned-repo license is reuse-build-vs-buy's domain
[close_reason] clone+hook-install have no wall-clock/timezone/expiry/TTL dependency; depth=full is not a time bound
